== Wikixedia ==

├── [[README.md]]
├── [[LICENSE]]
├── [[CONTRIBUTING.md]]
├── [[CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md]]
├── [[SECURITY.md]]
├── [[CHANGELOG.md]]
├── docs/
│   ├── [[index.md]]
│   ├── [[getting-started.md]]
│   ├── [[installation.md]{
│   ├──[[ architecture.md]]
│   ├── [[api.md
│   ├──[[ sdk.md]]
│   ├── tutorials/
│   ├──== reference/ ==
│   └── == projects/ ==
├── == wiki/ ==
│   ├── [[Home.md{]
│   ├── [[Sidebar.md]]
│   ├── [[Footer.md]]
│   └──[[ _Sidebar.md]]
├── src/
│   └── docs/
│       └──][ index.rdoc]]
└── assets/
    ├── images/
    └── logos/


Core Platform

* Markdown support
* MediaWiki syntax support
* RDoc support
* AsciiDoc support
* reStructuredText support
* Rich WYSIWYG editor
* Live preview
* Syntax highlighting
* Table of contents
* Internal and external linking
* Categories and tags
* Templates
* Page version history
* Page comparison (diff)
* Revision rollback
* Autosave
* Drafts

Knowledge Base

* Documentation portal
* Project documentation
* API documentation
* SDK documentation
* User guides
* Tutorials
* FAQs
* Glossary
* Release notes
* Changelog
* Architecture Decision Records (ADRs)

Search

* Full-text search
* Fuzzy search
* Search filters
* AI-powered semantic search
* Code search
* Search suggestions

AI Features

* AI documentation generation
* Automatic API documentation
* Code explanation
* Documentation summarization
* Translation
* Grammar improvement
* Documentation quality scoring
* AI Q&A over your documentation
* Intelligent link suggestions
* Duplicate content detection

Developer Tools

* OpenAPI/Swagger rendering
* GraphQL documentation
* SDK generation
* CLI documentation
* Interactive API playground
* Code snippets in multiple languages
* Mermaid diagrams
* UML diagrams
* PlantUML support
* LaTeX math
* Interactive notebooks

Collaboration

* Comments
* Discussions
* Suggestions
* Review workflow
* Pull request previews
* Team workspaces
* Mentions
* Notifications
* Activity feed

Authentication

* Local accounts
* OAuth
* GitHub login
* Google login
* Microsoft login
* LDAP
* SAML
* Two-factor authentication
* Role-based access control

Git Integration

* GitHub
* GitLab
* Bitbucket
* Automatic synchronization
* Branch previews
* Versioned documentation
* CI/CD integration
* Automatic deployments

DevOps

* Docker
* Docker Compose
* Kubernetes
* Helm charts
* Nginx
* PostgreSQL
* Redis
* Object storage
* CDN support
* Backup and restore

Security

* HTTPS
* Content Security Policy
* Rate limiting
* Audit logs
* Encryption
* Secret management
* Vulnerability scanning
* Spam protection

Administration

* Admin dashboard
* Analytics
* User management
* Permission management
* Theme manager
* Plugin manager
* Extension marketplace
* Configuration UI

User Experience

* Responsive design
* Dark mode
* Accessibility
* Keyboard shortcuts
* Breadcrumbs
* Reading progress
* Favorites
* Bookmarks
* Recently viewed
* Offline support (PWA)

Import/Export

* Markdown
* HTML
* PDF
* DOCX
* EPUB
* JSON
* YAML
* CSV
* ZIP
* MediaWiki XML

APIs

* REST API
* GraphQL API
* WebSocket API
* Webhooks
* SDKs for common languages

[[Monitoring]]

* Prometheus metrics
* Grafana dashboards
* Structured logging
* Health checks
* Tracing
* Performance profiling

[[Plugin System]]

* Custom themes
* Authentication plugins
* Search plugins
* AI providers
* Storage providers
* Analytics integrations
* Editor extensions
* Custom page types

Multi-language

* Internationalization (i18n)
* Localization (l10n)
* Automatic translation
* Per-language documentation versions

Web4 Ecosystem Integration

* Web4 documentation hub
* QubuHub documentation
* Aura Ecosystem documentation
* Fadaka Blockchain documentation
* GPT-5 Mini documentation
* RODAAI documentation
* NeuroMindAI documentation
* LAMIS documentation
* Shared API reference
* Unified search across projects

A practical technology stack for this 

[[vision could be]]
* Frontend: React + Next.js + TypeScript
* Backend: FastAPI (Python) or Go
* Database: PostgreSQL
* Cache: Redis
* Search: OpenSearch or Elasticsearch
* Object Storage: MinIO or S3
* Authentication: OAuth/OpenID Connect
* Documentation Parsing: Markdown, RDoc, AsciiDoc, MediaWiki, reStructuredText
* AI Services: Pluggable LLM interface supporting multiple providers
* Containerization: Docker and Kubernetes

* CI/CD: GitHub Actions



[[Phase 1 – Core Wiki]]

* User authentication
* Create, edit, and delete pages
* Markdown, MediaWiki, and RDoc support
* Full-text search
* Categories and tags
* Revision history
* Image and file uploads
* Dark/light theme
* Responsive UI

Phase 2 – Documentation Platform

* Versioned documentation
* API documentation
* SDK documentation
* OpenAPI/Swagger integration
* Mermaid and PlantUML diagrams
* Interactive code blocks
* PDF and HTML export
* Sidebar and navigation management

Phase 3 – AI Integration

* AI documentation generation
* AI-powered search
* Code explanation
* Documentation summarization
* Translation
* AI chatbot trained on project documentation
* Automatic API documentation generation

Phase 4 – Collaboration

* Comments
* Discussions
* Pull request previews
* Review and approval workflows
* Notifications
* Team workspaces

== Phase 5 – Enterprise ==

* Multi-tenancy
* Role-based access control
* LDAP/SAML/OAuth
* Audit logs
* Analytics
* Backup and restore
* Plugin marketplace
* Multi-language support

A suitable repository layout would be:

[["wikixedia/
├── apps/
│   ├── web/
│   ├── api/
│   ├── docs/
│   ├── ai/
│   └── search/
├── packages/
│   ├── ui/
│   ├── editor/
│   ├── parser/
│   ├── auth/
│   ├── markdown/
│   ├── mediawiki/
│   ├── rdoc/
│   ├── asciidoc/
│   ├── rst/
│   └── sdk/
├── database/
├── docker/
├── kubernetes/
├── scripts/
├── docs/
├── tests/
└── .github/"]]

A modern technology stack could include:

* Frontend: Next.js + React + TypeScript
* Backend: FastAPI
* Database: PostgreSQL
* Cache: Redis
* Search: OpenSearch
* Object storage: MinIO (or S3-compatible storage)
* Realtime: WebSockets
* Authentication: OAuth 2.0/OpenID Connect
* AI: Pluggable providers (OpenAI-compatible, local models, or other APIs)
* Deployment: Docker, Kubernetes, and GitHub Actions
